summary: iter217 Photo Intake Pipeline + Atelier Recognition - Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend Mobile: 8/8 mode tiles including live_camera working. Desktop EchoWaste panel not accessible via sidebar (pre-existing navigation issue, not iter217 related).

integration_issues.issue: EchoWaste/EchoYield panel not accessible from sidebar - panel is registered but not visible in sidebar menu. This is a pre-existing sidebar configuration issue, not related to iter217 changes.

action_items: Desktop sidebar: EchoYield/EchoWaste panel not visible in sidebar menu - may need to add to sidebar configuration or expand Intelligence & Forecasting section to show it
critical_code_review_comments: photo_intake.py: Well-structured 6-stage pipeline (intake → quality → face blur → consent → label OCR → fingerprint → recipe suggest)
AtelierView component: Properly implements dignified recognition (no XP/streaks) with 4 KPIs and 5 milestones
LiveCameraOverlay: Graceful degradation for getUserMedia unavailability, IMU pan guidance via DeviceMotionEvent
seed_data_creation: Test fingerprints created during test execution with unique HSV histograms
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter217 photo-intake pipeline fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/waste/photo-intake (valid + validation errors), GET /api/waste/photo-intake/{id}, GET /api/waste/photo-intake (list), GET /api/waste/photo-intake/atelier/stats. Fingerprint integration via photo_intake works. Regression tests for iter216 fingerprint endpoints pass. Mobile WasteTab shows 8 mode tiles including live_camera. Desktop EchoWaste panel exists but is not accessible via sidebar navigation - this is a pre-existing configuration issue.

backend: test_photo_intake_success - PASS (id starts with 'pi-', quality_score > 0.3, duration_ms > 0)
test_list_photo_intakes - PASS (ok=true, rows array, descending by created_at)
test_atelier_stats_structure - PASS (5 milestones, hit_rate 0..1, all required fields)
frontend: Mobile WasteTab - PASS (8/8 mode tiles: video, still, buffet_set, buffet_refill, buffet_close, ground_truth, draft_recipe, live_camera)
Mobile live_camera mode activation - PASS (CTA text changes to 'Open live camera')
Desktop EchoWaste panel - NOT ACCESSIBLE (sidebar navigation issue)

known_blockers: Desktop EchoWaste panel not accessible via sidebar - panel is registered in panel-registry.ts but not visible in sidebar menu. Mobile testing confirms all iter217 features work correctly.
